label: General AI Strategy & Public Sector Modernization
short_description: Broad, high-level discourse framing AI as a public-sector and societal development priority, largely detached from sector-specific regulation.

label: Operational AI Systems & Technical Deployment
short_description: Language focused on the deployment, use, and functioning of AI systems, contrasted with formal legal or administrative structuring text.

label: Non-English (Spanish) Policy Narrative
short_description: A language-driven component capturing Spanish-language policy narrative distinct from English-dominant AI governance text.

label: AI Systems Governance vs. Data Protection Regulation
short_description: A contrast between AI systems–focused regulatory text and traditional personal data protection and privacy compliance language.

label: Personal Data Processing & Compliance Infrastructure
short_description: Emphasis on personal data processing and compliance mechanisms, contrasted with national security or defense-oriented statutory text.

label: Non-English Education & Training Discourse
short_description: Education- and training-related policy language expressed in non-English (primarily Bulgarian), distinct from English AI governance and data protection text.

label: Formal AI & Data Protection Legal Structuring
short_description: Statutory and regulatory drafting language governing AI and personal data, contrasted with broader innovation and skills-oriented policy strategy.

label: Non-English (German) Policy Narrative
short_description: German-language policy narrative distinct from English-language data governance and privacy regulation text.

label: Research Citation & Referential Framing of AI
short_description: AI policy language anchored in references to reports, research documents, and external sources, contrasted with implementation-oriented digital transformation discourse.

label: Legislative Amendment & Statutory Editing Mechanics
short_description: Formal legislative amendment language indicating how statutes are modified, independent of substantive policy domains.

label: National Statutory Amendment vs. EU Regulatory Text
short_description: A component distinguishing national-level legislative amendment mechanics from EU-style regulatory drafting and institutional authority language.

label: UK Government Documentary & Publication Metadata
short_description: Language indicating UK government publication sources and web-based document references, contrasted with substantive AI and data governance content.

label: Digital Government & Public Service Transformation
short_description: Policy language focused on digital transformation of government services and rights, contrasted with research and innovation funding discourse.

label: EU AI Strategy & Regulatory Framing
short_description: Strategic and regulatory framing of AI at the EU level, contrasted with system-level and technical decision-making language.

label: Operational AI Systems & Digital Transformation
short_description: Emphasis on machine learning systems and operational digital transformation, contrasted with public-sector governance, oversight, and scientific advisory structures.

label: Data Protection & Rights-Based Regulation vs ML Systems
short_description: A strong contrast between rights-based legal regulation of personal data and technical discourse on machine learning models and systems.

label: Public Sector AI Decision-Making & Governance
short_description: Focus on the use of AI in public-sector decision-making and governance, contrasted with research/education/technical ML discourse and web/document references.

label: National Security & Defense AI Governance
short_description: Institutional language tied to national security and defense governance structures (secretaries, committees, programs), contrasted with legislative amendment scaffolding and EU legal framing.

label: Education, Skills & Workforce Development
short_description: Policy language centered on education, skills development, and online learning infrastructures, contrasted with EU cloud/service management and broader digital service governance.

label: Program-Specific Implementation (School Innovation / PNRR SmartLabs)
short_description: A document-specific implementation component capturing references to a particular school innovation program (SmartLabs/PNRR), contrasted with general science and ML development discourse.

label: EU Security & Sensitive Data Governance
short_description: EU-oriented governance language focused on security of systems and sensitive personal (including health) data, contrasted with national legislative amendment processes.

label: National Education Innovation Programs (PNRR / SmartLabs)
short_description: Document-specific language tied to nationally funded school innovation initiatives (e.g., PNRR SmartLabs), contrasted with broader EU digital economy and regulatory discourse.

label: EU Education, Research & Strategic Decision Frameworks
short_description: European-level education and research governance language associated with Horizon programs and strategic decision-making, contrasted with operational AI systems and public service implementation.

label: Education, Training & Skills Policy (Including Generative AI)
short_description: Policy discourse focused on education, training, skills development, and student-oriented initiatives, including emerging attention to generative AI, contrasted with infrastructure and security domains.

label: Health & Care Applications of Generative AI
short_description: Language emphasizing healthcare and care-sector applications of generative AI, including information services and education, contrasted with industrial ML and innovation governance.
